description: next/ v2.0 — ISA-95 storage location (a place where material lots/sublots are held). Referenced by MaterialLot and Quant via AT_LOCATION; rooted in the equipment hierarchy via PART_OF an Area.

attributes.name: warehouse
attributes.description: Warehouse / building the location belongs to.

attributes.name: location_type
attributes.description: Type of location (e.g. rack, floor, buffer, silo).

attributes.name: area_ref
attributes.description: FK to Area.area_id (PART_OF) — roots the location in the site/area hierarchy.

relationships.description: The area/site section this storage location sits in.

isa95.note: ISA-95 storage location — the AT_LOCATION target for MaterialLot and Quant.
